# Steven James Consulting

> AI Systems Architect and Fractional CTO helping owner-led businesses ($1M–$5M revenue) become findable, credible, and converting in the AI search era. Builds modular operating systems — not just software.

## What we do
- 20-Point AI Visibility Audit (free, 60 seconds): scores businesses across the signals AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini) use to recommend companies
- Fractional CTO services for owner-led businesses where the founder has become the system
- Done-for-you AI automation and 24/7 AI receptionist setup
- Custom AI operating systems built on the latest software, kept modular for easy upgrades

## Who we serve
- Owner-led service businesses doing $1M–$5M in annual revenue
- Founders who have hit the wall where they ARE the system and need it out of their head
- B2B and consumer-service operators competing for AI-driven recommendations

## How the audit works
The audit scores 20 signals across three tiers:
- **Foundation (Findable):** Schema markup, business listings, reviews
- **Signal (Credible):** Content, citations, authority
- **System (Converting):** Speed-to-lead, follow-up, document systems

Most businesses score under 8/20. The audit is free. The fixes are what get implemented.

## About Steven Barchetti
Founder of Steven James Consulting (ARV Venture Group LLC). Engineering and systems background. Builds AI operating systems for founder-led businesses that have outgrown duct-tape software stacks.
